name: Priya Sharma
title: Senior Backend Engineer

highlights: Architected microservices handling 12K RPS for payment processing
Led a team of 5 engineers
Reduced API latency by 40% through caching strategies
Built RESTful APIs serving 2M+ daily users
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and Docker

summary: Passionate backend engineer with deep expertise in building scalable distributed systems. Strong advocate for clean code and test-driven development. Thrives in fast-paced environments and loves mentoring junior developers.
current_job_satisfaction: Moderately dissatisfied — feels under-challenged in current role, micromanaged by leadership, and is passively exploring new opportunities that offer more autonomy and technical depth

name: Arjun Mehta
title: Full Stack Developer

highlights: Developed customer-facing booking platform used by 500K+ users
Implemented real-time notifications using WebSockets
Improved page load performance by 55%
Delivered 12+ client projects including e-commerce and SaaS dashboards
Built reusable component libraries

summary: Creative full-stack developer who bridges design and engineering. Passionate about pixel-perfect UIs and seamless user experiences. Active open-source contributor with 800+ GitHub stars across personal projects.
current_job_satisfaction: Highly dissatisfied — current company is going through layoffs, team morale is low, and he is actively interviewing at multiple companies

name: Sneha Reddy
title: Machine Learning Engineer
education: M.Tech AI & Machine Learning, IIIT Hyderabad (2019)

highlights: Built demand forecasting models saving $2M annually for retail client
Deployed 8 production ML pipelines on GCP
Published internal research paper on transformer-based time series forecasting

Co-authored paper at AAAI workshop

summary: Research-oriented ML engineer with a strong publication record and production deployment experience. Specializes in NLP and time-series forecasting. Passionate about making AI accessible and explainable.
current_job_satisfaction: Neutral — enjoys the work but feels compensation is below market rate. Open to roles with better pay and the chance to work on cutting-edge GenAI projects

name: Rahul Joshi
title: DevOps & Cloud Engineer

highlights: Managed infrastructure for 99.99% uptime payment systems
Reduced cloud costs by 30% through right-sizing and spot instances
Built zero-downtime deployment pipelines for 50+ microservices
Migrated 15 legacy applications to AWS
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform

summary: Battle-tested DevOps engineer who has scaled infrastructure for fintech at production scale. Deep expertise in AWS, Kubernetes, and infrastructure-as-code. Known for building self-healing, observable systems.
current_job_satisfaction: Very satisfied — loves the team, compensation is excellent, and he's recently been promoted. Not actively looking but would consider a truly exceptional offer with a leadership role

name: Ananya Krishnan
title: Data Analyst

Built executive dashboards tracking $50M+ in GMV

summary: Early-career data analyst with an exceptional statistics foundation and a knack for turning messy data into compelling business narratives. Quick learner eager to grow into a data science role.

Led migration from class components to React Hooks

summary: Performance-obsessed frontend engineer with experience at India's top consumer tech companies. Deeply cares about accessibility and user experience. Comfortable leading frontend architecture decisions.
